mod.name: Defend The Base Event
mod.author: Collocorpusek
mod.config:
dtbConfig = { base = { -- Positions -- fromPos = {x=4914, y=3119, z=7}, toPos = {x=4920, y=3125, z=7}, showInfoPos = {x=4917, y=3122, z=7},
-- Storage -- points = 44533,
-- Flags -- flags = { [1] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3121, z=7}, id = {1879,1868,1871}}, [2] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3122, z=7}, id = {1879,1868,1871}}, [3] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3123, z=7}, id = {1879,1868,1871}},
[4] = {pos = {x=4918, y=3124, z=7}, id = {1878,1867,1870}}, [5] = {pos = {x=4917, y=3124, z=7}, id = {1878,1867,1870}}, [6] = {pos = {x=4916, y=3124, z=7}, id = {1878,1867,1870}},
-- NEXT FLOOR -- [7] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3122, z=6}, id = {1879,1868,1871}}, [8] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3123, z=6}, id = {1879,1868,1871}}, [9] = {pos = {x=4918, y=3124, z=6}, id = {1878,1867,1870}}, [10] = {pos = {x=4917, y=3124, z=6}, id = {1878,1867,1870}},
-- NEXT FLOOR -- [11] = {pos = {x=4919, y=3123, z=5}, id = {1879,1868,1871}}, [12] = {pos = {x=4918, y=3124, z=5}, id = {1878,1867,1870}} },
topFlagPos = {pos = {x=4919, y=3124, z=2}, id = {4990,11330,11326}} },
red = { teleportPos = {x = 4944, y = 3117, z = 7}, storage = 44534, currentTime = 44535, scores = 44536 },
blue = { teleportPos = {x = 4890, y = 3121, z = 7}, storage = 44537, currentTime = 44538, scores = 44539 },
walls = { {pos = {x = 4894, y = 3121, z = 7}, id = 6844}, {pos = {x = 4894, y = 3122, z = 7}, id = 6844}, {pos = {x = 4894, y = 3123, z = 7}, id = 6844}, {pos = {x = 4894, y = 3124, z = 7}, id = 6844}, {pos = {x = 4894, y = 3125, z = 7}, id = 6844},
{pos = {x = 4938, y = 3115, z = 7}, id = 1167}, {pos = {x = 4938, y = 3116, z = 7}, id = 1167}, {pos = {x = 4938, y = 3117, z = 7}, id = 1167}, {pos = {x = 4938, y = 3118, z = 7}, id = 1167} },
days = { ['Monday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Tuesday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Wednesday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Thursday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Friday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Saturday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'19:00:00'},
['Sunday'] = {'03:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'07:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'11:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'15:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'19:00:00'} },
-- Rewards -- rewards = {6527},
-- Requires -- minLevel = 100, minOfParticipants = 5, -- minimum graczy z kazdej druzyny aby event sie rozpoczal maxOfParticipants = 40, -- ile moze byc maksymalnie uczestnikow w jeden druzynie
-- Storage -- eventStorage = 44540, joinEventStorage = 44541, deathStorage = 'deathDTB',
-- Times -- startTime = 300, -- [seconds] time with which each team is starting
finishEvent = 30, -- [minutes] timeToStartJoiningToDTB = 0.0, timeToStartDTBEvent = 5.0, waitTime = 20, -- seconds
-- Base -- maxBasePoints = 12, basePointsToControl = 10,
text = 'BR-\nO que fazer para ganhar? Seu time deve tomar a base e manter sua posse por 3 minutos. \nPara assumir a base, você tem que estar na superioridade em torno dela. \nA base adquirida informa as bandeiras suspensas.' }
mod.lib:
domodlib('DTB_config')
function doCreateDtb() doCreateNpc("DTB", {x = 163, y = 53, z = 7})
return true end
function doCreateDtb2() doCreateNpc("DTB", {x = 148, y = 51, z = 7})
return true end
local cfg = { time = dtbConfig.timeToStartDTBEvent*60, cor = TEXTCOLOR_RED, to = {x = 0, y = 0, z = 0}, pos = {x = 166, y = 53, z = 7} }
function deleteTeleport() local teleport = getTileItemById(cfg.pos, 1387).uid if(teleport > 0) then doRemoveItem(teleport) doSendMagicEffect(cfg.pos, CONST_ME_POFF) doSendAnimatedText(cfg.pos, "Closed", TEXTCOLOR_RED)
end return false end
function doCreateTeleportDTB() if countDown(cfg.pos, cfg.time, cfg.cor) then local teleport1 =doCreateTeleport(1387, cfg.to, cfg.pos) doItemSetAttribute(teleport1, "uid", 25417) doSendMagicEffect(cfg.pos, CONST_ME_ENERGYAREA) addEvent(deleteTeleport, cfg.time * 1000) addEvent(doRemoveNPC, cfg.time * 1000) addEvent(doRemoveNPC2, cfg.time * 1000) -- doRemoveNPC() end return false end
------------------------------------- ---- dla blue teamu przypisuje sie wartosci ujemne (basa) ---- dla red teamu przypisuje sie wartosci dodatnie (basa) function doAddScoreToBase() local v = dtbConfig.base
local blue, red = 0, 0 for x = v.fromPos.x, v.toPos.x do for y = v.fromPos.y, v.toPos.y do local n, i = getTileInfo({x=x, y=y, z=v.toPos.z}).creatures, 1 if n ~= 0 then local t = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=v.toPos.z, stackpos=i}).uid while t ~= 0 do if isPlayer(t) then if getCreatureStorage(t, dtbConfig.red.storage) > 0 then red = red + 1 elseif getCreatureStorage(t, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 then blue = blue + 1 end end i = i + 1 t = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=v.toPos.z, stackpos=i}).uid end end end end
-- ustawia storage basy local addPoints = getStorage(v.points) + (red - blue) if math.abs(addPoints) > dtbConfig.maxBasePoints then local t = 1 if addPoints < 0 then if getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1 > 0 then t = getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1 doSetStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime, getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1) else doCloseDtbEvent('blue') end else if getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1 > 0 then t = getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1 doSetStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime, getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1) else doCloseDtbEvent('red') end end
doSetStorage(v.points, (addPoints < 0 and - dtbConfig.maxBasePoints or dtbConfig.maxBasePoints)) doSendAnimatedText(v.showInfoPos, secondsToClock(t), (addPoints < 0 and COLOR_LIGHTBLUE or COLOR_RED)) else -- Add points -- if math.abs(addPoints) < dtbConfig.basePointsToControl then doSendAnimatedText(v.showInfoPos, 'Neutral', COLOR_WHITE) else local t = 0 if addPoints < 0 then if getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1 > 0 then t = getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1 doSetStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime, getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) - 1) else doCloseDtbEvent('blue') end else if getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1 > 0 then t = getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1 doSetStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime, getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) - 1) else doCloseDtbEvent('red') end end
local takeControl = addPoints < 0 and 'blue' or 'red' doSendAnimatedText(v.showInfoPos, secondsToClock(t), (takeControl == 'blue' and COLOR_LIGHTBLUE or COLOR_RED)) end doSetStorage(v.points, addPoints) end
-- Top flag -- local topFlag for _, id in pairs(v.topFlagPos.id) do if getTileItemById(v.topFlagPos.pos, id).uid > 0 then topFlag = getTileItemById(v.topFlagPos.pos, id).uid break end end
if topFlag ~= nil then if math.abs(addPoints) < dtbConfig.basePointsToControl then doTransformItem(topFlag, v.topFlagPos.id[1]) else doTransformItem(topFlag, v.topFlagPos.id[(addPoints < 0 and 3 or 2)]) end end
-- Tapestry -- for i, flags in pairs(v.flags) do local flag for _, id in pairs(flags.id) do if getTileItemById(flags.pos, id).uid > 0 then flag = getTileItemById(flags.pos, id).uid break end end
if flag ~= nil then if i > math.abs(addPoints) then doTransformItem(flag, flags.id[1]) else doTransformItem(flag, flags.id[(addPoints < 0 and 3 or 2)]) end end end end
function secondsToClock(sSeconds) local nSeconds = tonumber(sSeconds) if nSeconds == 0 then return "00:00" else local nMins = string.format("%02.f", math.floor(nSeconds / 60)) local nSecs = string.format("%02.f", math.floor(nSeconds - nMins * 60))
return nMins..":"..nSecs end end
function getAmountParticipants() local blue, red = {}, {} for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 then table.insert(blue, pid) elseif getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.red.storage) > 0 then table.insert(red, pid) end end return blue, red end function doRemoveDtbNpc() local from = {x = 103, y = 22, z = 7} local to = {x = 213, y = 93, z = 7} local monster = "DTB" for x = from.x, to.x do for y = from.y, to.y do for z = from.z, to.z do pos = {x = x, y = y, z = z, stackpos = 253} v = getThingfromPos(pos).uid if isNpc(v) and getCreatureName(v):lower() == monster:lower() then doRemoveCreature(v) end end end end return true end function openDtbEvent() doSetStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage, 1) doCreateTeleportDTB() doCreateDtb() doCreateDtb2() doBroadcastMessage("[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event Vai começar em 5 minutos.\n\n Premio de 10 crystal coin coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 60000, "[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event Vai começar em 4 minutos.\n\n Premio de 10 crystal coin coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 120000, "[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event Vai começar em 3 minutos.\n\n Premio de 10 crystal coin coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 180000, "[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event Vai começar em 2 minutos.\n\n Premio de 10 crystal coin coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 240000, "[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event Vai começar em 1 minuto.\n\n Premio de 10 crystal coin coins.") addEvent(doStartDtbEvent, 300000) addEvent(doRemoveDtbNpc, 300000) for k, v in pairs(dtbConfig.walls) do doCreateItem(v.id, 1, v.pos) end end
function doStartDtbEvent() for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if isInArray({getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.blue.storage), getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.red.storage)}, 1) then doCreatureSetNoMove(pid, false) doRemoveCondition(pid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) end end
local blue, red = getAmountParticipants() if #blue >= dtbConfig.minOfParticipants and #red >= dtbConfig.minOfParticipants then doBroadcastMessage('[DTB]\n\nLet\'s A batalha iniciou! Os portões foram abertos!', MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE) addEvent( function() if getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) < getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) then doCloseDtbEvent('red') elseif getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime) > getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime) then doCloseDtbEvent('blue') else doCloseDtbEvent('draw') end end, dtbConfig.finishEvent * 1000 * 60 ) else doBroadcastMessage('[DTB]\n\nEvento não foi iniciado por falta de Players!', MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR) for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do -- Storages -- if getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, dtbConfig.blue.storage, -1) -- TP -- doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doRemoveCondition(pid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) elseif getCreatureStorage(pid, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, dtbConfig.red.storage, -1) -- TP -- doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doRemoveCondition(pid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) end end
-- Clean tabeli i event storage -- doSetStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage, -1) end
for k, v in pairs(dtbConfig.walls) do doRemoveItem(getTileItemById(v.pos, v.id).uid) end
doSetStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime, dtbConfig.startTime) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime, dtbConfig.startTime) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage, -1) end
function doCloseDtbEvent(winTeam) if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) ~= -1 then doBroadcastMessage('[DTB]\n\nEvento terminou! '..(winTeam == 'draw' and ('Não teve time vencedor. A batalha foi encerrada.') or ('Winner is: ' .. winTeam .. ' team. Congratulations!')), MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR) local reward = dtbConfig.rewards[math.random(#dtbConfig.rewards)]
for _, eventPlayers in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(eventPlayers, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(eventPlayers, dtbConfig.blue.storage, -1) -- clean storage if winTeam == 'blue' then doPlayerAddItem(eventPlayers, reward, 10) -- blue win end
doTeleportThing(eventPlayers, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(eventPlayers))) -- tp doCreatureAddHealth(eventPlayers, getCreatureMaxHealth(eventPlayers) - getCreatureHealth(eventPlayers)) doCreatureAddMana(eventPlayers, getCreatureMaxMana(eventPlayers) - getCreatureMana(eventPlayers))
doRemoveCondition(eventPlayers, CONDITION_OUTFIT) -- outfit doRemoveConditions(eventPlayers) elseif getCreatureStorage(eventPlayers, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(eventPlayers, dtbConfig.red.storage, -1) -- clean storage if winTeam == 'red' then doPlayerAddItem(eventPlayers, reward, 10) -- red win end
doTeleportThing(eventPlayers, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(eventPlayers))) -- tp doCreatureAddHealth(eventPlayers, getCreatureMaxHealth(eventPlayers) - getCreatureHealth(eventPlayers)) doCreatureAddMana(eventPlayers, getCreatureMaxMana(eventPlayers) - getCreatureMana(eventPlayers))
doRemoveCondition(eventPlayers, CONDITION_OUTFIT) -- outfit doRemoveConditions(eventPlayers) end
doCreatureSetStorage(eventPlayers, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0) end
-- Clean all storages -- addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.base.points, 0)
addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.red.scores, 0) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.red.currentTime, 10000) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.blue.scores, 0) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.blue.currentTime, 10000)
doSetStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage, -1) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage, -1)
addEvent(cleanFlags, 2000) -- clean flags and tapestry end end
function cleanFlags() local topFlag for _, id in pairs(dtbConfig.base.topFlagPos.id) do if getTileItemById(dtbConfig.base.topFlagPos.pos, id).uid > 0 then topFlag = getTileItemById(dtbConfig.base.topFlagPos.pos, id).uid break end end
if topFlag ~= nil then doTransformItem(topFlag, dtbConfig.base.topFlagPos.id[1]) end
-- Tapestry -- for i, flags in pairs(dtbConfig.base.flags) do local flag for _, id in pairs(flags.id) do if getTileItemById(flags.pos, id).uid > 0 then flag = getTileItemById(flags.pos, id).uid break end end
if flag ~= nil then doTransformItem(flag, flags.id[1]) end end end
function doStartCountingDtbEvent(x) if dtbConfig.timeToStartJoiningToDTB-x > 0 then doBroadcastMessage('[DTB]\n\nDefend The Base Event sera iniciado em '..dtbConfig.timeToStartJoiningToDTB+dtbConfig.timeToStartDTBEvent-x..' minutos, compremio de 50 Tokens.') addEvent(doStartCountingDtbEvent, 60*1000, x+1) else openDtbEvent() end end
mod.talkaction:
domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) ~= 1 then doStartCountingDtbEvent(0) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage, 1) else doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não pode fazer isso se o "evento DEFEND THE BASE" ainda estiver ativado.') end return true end
mod.movement:
domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
local conditionBlue = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionBlue, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionBlue, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 87, lookBody = 87, lookLegs = 87, lookFeet = 87, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionRed = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionRed, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionRed, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 94, lookBody = 94, lookLegs = 94, lookFeet = 94, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionBlue = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionBlue, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionBlue, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 87, lookBody = 87, lookLegs = 87, lookFeet = 87, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionRed = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionRed, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionRed, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 94, lookBody = 94, lookLegs = 94, lookFeet = 94, lookAddons = 3})
function onStepIn(cid, item, position, fromPosition) local blue, red = getAmountParticipants()
--if param == 'info' then if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) == 1 and getStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage) ~= 1 and (#blue > 0 or #red > 0) then return doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, 'DTB em andamento.\nRed time: '..secondsToClock(getStorage(dtbConfig.red.currentTime))..'\nBlue time: '..secondsToClock(getStorage(dtbConfig.blue.currentTime))..'') --end elseif getStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage) == 1 then if getPlayerLevel(cid) < dtbConfig.minLevel then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não tem o level minimo para participar. level minimo de [' .. dtbConfig.minLevel .. ']')
elseif #blue == dtbConfig.maxOfParticipants and #red == dtbConfig.maxOfParticipants then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'O limite máximo de jogadores no evento foi atingido!') elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 or getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você já está no evento!') end
if #blue > 0 or #red > 0 then if #blue > #red then doTeleportThing(cid, dtbConfig.red.teleportPos) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage, 1) doAddCondition(cid, conditionRed) elseif #blue < #red then doTeleportThing(cid, dtbConfig.blue.teleportPos) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage, 1) doAddCondition(cid, conditionBlue) elseif #blue == #red then local team = math.random(2) == 1 and dtbConfig.blue or dtbConfig.red doTeleportThing(cid, team.teleportPos) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, team.storage, 1) doAddCondition(cid, getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 and conditionBlue or conditionRed) end else local team = math.random(2) == 1 and dtbConfig.blue or dtbConfig.red doTeleportThing(cid, team.teleportPos) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, team.storage, 1) doAddCondition(cid, getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 and conditionBlue or conditionRed) end
doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) doPlayerPopupFYI(cid, dtbConfig.text) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0) doAddCondition(cid, createConditionObject(CONDITION_INFIGHT, -1)) else doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Ainda não é tempo!') end return true end
mod.event:
domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
function onLogin(cid) if getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage, -1) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0)
doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid)), true) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage, -1) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0)
doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid)), true) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) end
registerCreatureEvent(cid, 'DTB_statsChange') registerCreatureEvent(cid, 'DTB_target') return true end

domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
local conditionBlue = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionBlue, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionBlue, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 87, lookBody = 87, lookLegs = 87, lookFeet = 87, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionRed = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionRed, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionRed, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 94, lookBody = 94, lookLegs = 94, lookFeet = 94, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionWhite = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionWhite, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionWhite, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 0, lookBody = 0, lookLegs = 0, lookFeet = 0, lookAddons = 3})
function onStatsChange(cid, attacker, type, combat, value) if type == 1 and getCreatureHealth(cid) <= value then if isPlayer(cid) then if getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage) > 0 then doTeleportThing(cid, dtbConfig.red.teleportPos) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, 'Você está a morto e você tem que esperar '..dtbConfig.waitTime..' segundos para voltar pra batalha.') doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, true) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 1) addEvent( function(cid) if isPlayer(cid) then doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false)
doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) doAddCondition(cid, conditionRed) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, 'Você entrou no evento.') end end, dtbConfig.waitTime * 1000, cid )
doRemoveConditions(cid)
doCreatureAddHealth(cid, getCreatureMaxHealth(cid) - getCreatureHealth(cid)) doCreatureAddMana(cid, getCreatureMaxMana(cid) - getCreatureMana(cid)) doAddCondition(cid, conditionWhite) return false elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 then doTeleportThing(cid, dtbConfig.blue.teleportPos) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, 'Você está morto e você tem que esperar '..dtbConfig.waitTime..' segundos para voltar pra batalha.') doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, true) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 1) addEvent( function(cid) if isPlayer(cid) then doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false)
doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) doAddCondition(cid, conditionBlue) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage, 0) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, 'Você pode participar do evento novamente.') end end, dtbConfig.waitTime * 1000, cid ) doRemoveConditions(cid)
doCreatureAddHealth(cid, getCreatureMaxHealth(cid) - getCreatureHealth(cid)) doCreatureAddMana(cid, getCreatureMaxMana(cid) - getCreatureMana(cid)) doAddCondition(cid, conditionWhite) return false end end end return true end

domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
function onCombat(cid, target) if isPlayer(cid) and isPlayer(target) then if getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 and getCreatureStorage(target, dtbConfig.red.storage) == 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não pode atacar seus companheiros de equipe.') and false elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 and getCreatureStorage(target, dtbConfig.blue.storage) == 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não pode atacar seus companheiros de equipe.') and false elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage) == 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não pode atacar seus companheiros de equipe.') and false end end return true end
mod.globalevent:
domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
local daysOpen = {}
for k, v in pairs(dtbConfig.days) do table.insert(daysOpen, k) end
function onThink(interval) if isInArray(daysOpen, os.date('%A')) then if isInArray(dtbConfig.days[os.date('%A')], os.date('%X', os.time())) then if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) ~= 1 then doStartCountingDtbEvent(0) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage, 1) end end end return true end

domodlib('DTB_config') domodlib('DTB_lib')
function onThink(interval) if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) == 1 then doAddScoreToBase() end return true end

domodlib('DTB_config')
local conditionBlue = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionBlue, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionBlue, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 87, lookBody = 87, lookLegs = 87, lookFeet = 87, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionRed = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionRed, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionRed, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 94, lookBody = 94, lookLegs = 94, lookFeet = 94, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionWhite = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionWhite, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionWhite, {lookType = 335, lookHead = 0, lookBody = 0, lookLegs = 0, lookFeet = 0, lookAddons = 3})
function onThink(interval) if getStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage) == 1 then for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.deathStorage) > 0 then doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) doAddCondition(cid, conditionWhite) elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.blue.storage) > 0 then doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) doAddCondition(cid, conditionBlue) elseif getCreatureStorage(cid, dtbConfig.red.storage) > 0 then doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) doAddCondition(cid, conditionRed) end end end return true end

domodlib('DTB_config')
function onStartup() addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.base.points, 0)
addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.red.scores, 0) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.red.currentTime, 10000) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.blue.scores, 0) addEvent(doSetStorage, 2000, dtbConfig.blue.currentTime, 10000)
doSetStorage(dtbConfig.eventStorage, -1) doSetStorage(dtbConfig.joinEventStorage, -1) return true end
